html:
Initial View
Welcome! The scene depicts a camera moving forward along its own optical axis.
⚠ Figure failed to load

interactions.label: Forward Speed
interactions.teaches: Controls the speed of the camera moving forward along the Z-axis.

interactions.label: Object Depth
interactions.teaches: Changes the depth of the objects relative to the camera.

demo_steps.title: Initial View
demo_steps.narration: Welcome! The scene depicts a camera moving forward. Observe the arrows indicating motion. Objects near the center remain stable while others seem to expand outward.

demo_steps.title: Increase Speed
demo_steps.narration: By increasing the forward speed, notice how the arrows representing motion become longer, signifying faster apparent motion of objects away from the focus of expansion.

demo_steps.title: Vary Object Depth
demo_steps.narration: Now decrease the depth of objects. See how nearby objects appear to move faster than those further away due to the increased parallax effect.

demo_steps.title: Focus of Expansion
demo_steps.narration: Returning to the initial speed and depth, observe that around the center, the motion is negligible, highlighting the concept of the focus of expansion.

interactionPlan.camera_suggestion: Positioned to face the series of panels, with a slight angle to convey depth and show expansion clearly.
interactionPlan.notes: Consider using motion blur effects to emphasize speed changes; Three.js's perspective camera can be used for rendering.

attempts.html:
Initial View
Welcome! The scene depicts a camera moving forward. Observe the arrows indicating motion.
⚠ Figure failed to load

discrepancies: The arrows in the generated figure are smaller in thickness compared to the source.
Labels added in the generated figure do not appear in the source figure.
The arrangement of the frustums has additional spacing between them in the generated figure.
The background color is consistent, but the label colors add visual differences.
evaluation.notes: The generated figure includes extra elements not in the source and has minor geometry and color issues.
action_items: Ensure all arrow sizes match those in the source closely.
Remove labels or clearly distinguish which elements are meant to be labeled.
Adjust the placement and spacing of frustums to more closely align with the source.

feedback.rationale: The discrepancies and action items indicate issues with the execution of the plan, specifically with arrow thickness, label handling, and spacing adjustments, which suggests refining the generation is necessary.
action_items: Ensure all arrow sizes match those in the source closely.
Remove labels or clearly distinguish which elements are meant to be labeled.
Adjust the placement and spacing of frustums to more closely align with the source.
